allow: Bash(tools/.venv/bin/python -c "import PIL, numpy, anthropic; print\('deps ok in venv'\)")
Bash(env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u PAGEPROC_PROVIDER OPENAI_API_KEY=dummy PYTHONPATH=tools tools/.venv/bin/python -c "from pageproc import config; print\('->', config.load\(\).provider\)")

Bash(env PAGEPROC_PROVIDER=anthropic ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=dummy PYTHONPATH=tools tools/.venv/bin/python -c "from pageproc import config, providers; b=providers.make\(config.load\(\)\); print\('->', type\(b\).__name__\)")

Bash(env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u PAGEPROC_PROVIDER OPENAI_API_KEY=dummy PAGEPROC_FIRST_MODEL=gpt-4.1-mini PAGEPROC_ESCALATE_MODEL=gpt-4o PYTHONPATH=tools tools/.venv/bin/python -c "from pageproc import config; c=config.load\(\); print\('->', c.first_model, c.escalate_model\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=tools tools/.venv/bin/python -c "from pageproc import cli, extract, reconcile, render, providers, segment, image, config; print\('all modules import clean'\)")
